name: Coinbase Developer Platform (CDP)
pricing_notes: Free for development; mainnet fees apply per transaction; Gas fees separate

auth.notes: CDP API key + secret (JWT-based); key file download from Coinbase Developer Portal

performance.notes: Blockchain confirmation latency varies; wallet operations ~500ms; on-chain tx depends on network

agent_readiness.notes: Programmatic crypto wallet creation, funding, and transactions for agents. Onchain Agent Kit: LangChain tools for agents. Multi-chain (Ethereum, Base, Polygon). Gas-sponsored transactions. AgentKit for AI agents. Wallets persist across sessions.

gotchas: Regulatory complexity for financial applications involving real crypto
Gas fees unpredictable and add to transaction costs
Smart contract interaction requires Solidity knowledge
Wallet key management is developer's responsibility (loss = loss of funds)
Not suitable for consumer-facing apps without additional compliance
best_when: AI agents that need native on-chain payment capabilities
DeFi automation agents needing programmatic wallet control
LangChain-based agents needing crypto transaction tools
avoid_when: Traditional fiat payment use cases (use Stripe)
summary: Coinbase Developer Platform (CDP) provides programmable crypto wallet infrastructure for AI agents. CDP AgentKit gives LangChain agents on-chain capabilities: create wallets, send/receive crypto, interact with DeFi protocols. Multi-chain (Base, Ethereum, Polygon). Gas-sponsored transactions. Pioneer tool for agent-native payments and the emerging x402 pay-per-request paradigm.
